---
title: ""
---

<div class="profile-columns">
<div class="profile-photo">
<img src="nils-roemer.jpg" alt="Dr. Nils Roemer" />
<small>Photo © Xenia Bluhm</small>
</div>
<div class="profile-text">

## Dr. Nils Roemer

I am a researcher, entrepreneur, and lecturer based in Hamburg, Germany.

I hold a degree in Business Administration with a focus on Operations and Supply Chain Management (2018) and a PhD in Operations Research and Mathematical Optimization (2022). Since 2023, I am Co-Founder and Managing Director of [Planningio GmbH](https://planningio.com), a Hamburg-based software and consulting company specializing in mathematical optimization.

Our projects span automated production planning for the beverage industry, crowd management, warehouse simulation, and industrial digitalization.

*I teach to inspire students to think analytically and to bring quantitative methods to life through real-world applications.*

<div class="social-links"><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nroemer/" target="_blank"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="16" height="16"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 0 1-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 1 1 2.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg> LinkedIn</a><a href="mailto:nils.roemer@planningio.com"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" width="16" height="16"><rect width="20" height="16" x="2" y="4" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg> Email</a></div>

</div>
</div>
